item.title: Resume
item.description:
Profile

Full-stack engineer specializing in prediction markets and blockchain protocol development. Building at the intersection of AI/LLM and decentralized finance — from semantic market matching with vector databases to autonomous oracle systems powered by collective AI decision-making. Deep expertise in DeFi liquidity design, including AMM mechanisms (CPAMM), cross-platform liquidity aggregation, and solving liquidity fragmentation across prediction markets. Tech lead with 11+ prizes across international hackathons including ETH Global (Tokyo, Singapore, Bangkok), Consensus Hong Kong, and web3 Global Hackathon. Selected for the National Institute of Informatics’ Experts in Information Science Program.

item.title: Projects
item.description:
Knockout

Tokyo Builders’ Arena 2025 (Sui × ONE Championship) - 1st Place (33 teams) | Role: Tech Lead

A participatory leveraged betting app for combat sports. Users pick a fighter (Team A / Team B) and tap to increase their leverage — stake is calculated as base_stake × n^taps. Built on Sui blockchain for transparent, tamper-proof bet logic and fund caps. Features round-based time limits with KO and time-up mechanics, real-time updates via Supabase Realtime, and a mobile-first PWA experience.
